one_time_description: Subsequent to year-end, First Nation received $340,083,000 from Robinson Huron Treaty settlement; $265,400,000 to be distributed to eligible members
economic_notes: First Nation owns Nigig Power Corporation (wind power GBE), 33.33% interest in Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (construction industry), Henvey Inlet Wind LP partnership, gas bar operation, trailer park, Pickerel Contracting Limited. Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $340M received subsequent to year-end.
notes: Complex structure: consolidates Key Harbour Settlement Trust, Adtores Properties GP Ltd, HIW Property Holdings LP, HIW Property Holdings GP Inc, and Pickerel Contracting Limited. Nigig Power Corporation (wind power) is GBE accounted for by modified equity method - major income driver at $25.4M share of earnings. Shwe Miikaan LP is non-controlled entity also on modified equity. Large Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $340,083,000 received after year-end with $265,400,000 to be distributed to members - not reflected in 2024 financials. Contributions to Windfarm Legacy Trust of $13.8M are a significant recurring item. FNFA loan of $91.5M is dominant liability. Accumulated surplus per balance sheet is $64,864,798 which differs from statement of operations accumulated operating surplus of $64,610,102 due to inclusion of GBE investments, trusts, reserves and remeasurement gains. Prior year surplus figure from statement of changes shows $12,317,478 vs $12,314,478 on operations statement - minor reclassification. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text.
